steps.title: Substitute the given value of x
steps.content:
Since we're given that $x = 3$, we substitute this directly into the first equation $4x + y = 37$:
$$4(3) + y = 37$$

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content:
Simplify the left side:
$$12 + y = 37$$
Subtract 12 from both sides to isolate $y$:
$$y = 37 - 12 = 25$$
